description_long: This airplane features a blocky, voxel-style design with a predominantly green and white fuselage accented by purple and red elements. The wings are straight and extend widely from the central body, with green tips and a stepped, pixelated pattern on the upper surfaces. The nose is pointed and flanked by green panels, while the undercarriage appears to have two gray, rectangular engine-like structures. The tail is compact and integrated into the rear fuselage, with no distinct vertical stabilizer visible. The cockpit area is centrally located at the front, marked by a white and green section, and the overall appearance is stylized and geometric, reminiscent of retro or toy-like aircraft. The surface finish is matte, and the object appears to be constructed from plastic or similar lightweight material.
description: A stylized, voxel-like airplane with green, white, and purple coloring, wide straight wings, and a compact, geometric design. The cockpit is front-mounted, and the surface is matte and blocky.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, green and white cockpit area, and wide straight wings with green tips.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thin, flat structure of the airplane and the stepped pattern on the wing's upper surface.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the compact tail section and the symmetrical wing design with visible engine-like structures underneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the flatness and blocky construction of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Straight mid-wing configuration with blocky, stepped upper surfaces and green wingtip accents.
attribute_engine_type: Twin block-like engines mounted under the fuselage, type not visually specified.
attribute_tail_design: Integrated tail with no distinct vertical stabilizer, conventional horizontal tailplane implied by geometry.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the front fuselage, single-seat implied by size.
